# Version 3.119.5
> **WinUI Projection fix for .NET 9**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.5 is a servicing release that fixes the WinUI Projection assembly failing to load on .NET 9 consumers.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **WinUI Projection DLL now loads on .NET 9** — Restores packaging of the WinUI projection assembly so .NET 9 apps no longer hit DllNotFoundException when consuming SkiaSharp.Views.WinUI. ([#4086](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4086))
